source_policy: fully authored Blender textureable geometry with contained closed track pods, integrated turret ring overlap, split UV plates, and coaxial MG; no Meshy chassis or turret imports; rejected boxmodel remains prior evidence only
uv_policy: box and planar UV plates, one 0-1 paintable plate per surface family; no atlas packing

dalle_paintability.prompt_rule: Use the filename/surface id in the prompt; do not paint labels or readable typography inside the image.
dalle_paintability.first_pass: runtime albedo plates avoid guide seams; authoring templates retain safe-area guides.

orientation_contract.authored_axes: X forward/back, Y up/down, Z left/right
orientation_contract.blender_axes: X forward/back, Y left/right, Z up/down after P/S/R conversion helpers
orientation_contract.threejs_axes_after_gltf: X forward/back, Y up/down, Z left/right
orientation_contract.visual_regression_prevented: tank must not export on its side; barrel and coaxial MG must point forward; wheels must be contained inside closed track pods rather than outside side skirts; track pods must preserve top, bottom, front, rear, inner, and outer band thickness; turret lower overlap must hide the ring gap; hatches must touch the turret roof; no pasted cover panels, blockers, wing plates, or runtime overlays

runtime_contract.cannon_elevation: rotate cannon_elevation_pivot for barrel and coaxial MG pitch
runtime_contract.coaxial_mg: coaxial_mg is parented to cannon_elevation_pivot and must move with the barrel
runtime_contract.tread_motion: scroll material maps on left_tread_motion and right_tread_motion
runtime_contract.wheel_motion: rotate children of left_roadwheel_group and right_roadwheel_group
runtime_contract.side_skirt_occlusion: roadwheel discs sit inside track pod/skirt volume; exterior track bands contain wheel faces without cutting through them
runtime_contract.integrated_sponson_skirt_armor: joined sponson shells bridge the upper hull into contained track pods; running gear remains mechanically owned by the pods and not pasted in front of a slab
runtime_contract.raycast_exterior_closure: outside gap rays hit exterior armor before interior at front-left, front-right, rear-left, and rear-right hull/track corners
runtime_contract.commander_hatch: commander_hatch__turret_top is a named posture marker
